push.empty: No pushes in the last 7 days

version_intelligence.title: Fleet version intelligence
version_intelligence.no_findings: No collectors below recommendation and no unsupported components detected.
version_intelligence.below_reason: Collector is below the recommended version.
version_intelligence.unsupported_reason: Collector capabilities do not support this component.

action.unsupported_component: Choose an older config, upgrade collector, or remove {{component}}.

config_safety.title: Config safety status
config_safety.hint: Safe remote config across supervised collectors
config_safety.error: Unable to load config safety status.

status.ready: Validation, diff, safe push and rollback are available on workload detail pages.
status.empty: No supervised collectors report remote config yet.
status.failed: At least one collector failed to apply remote config.
status.applying: A remote config change is applying.

versioning.compare_needs_two: Need at least two revisions to compare
versioning.compare_error: Failed to load one of the revisions.
versioning.rollback_confirm_body: Re-push revision {{hash}} to this workload. The agent will receive it as a new push.
versioning.raw_diff_warning: Raw YAML diff may contain sensitive values.

otel.title: OTel impact summary
otel.helper: Review collector-level changes before pushing this config.
otel.unavailable: OTel impact summary unavailable. Fix YAML errors or reload the active config to compute it.

safety.title: Config safety
safety.subtitle: Know what will change before it reaches this workload.

readonly.title: Read-only collector
readonly.body: Push is unavailable because this collector only reports config. Run it under the OpAMP Supervisor to enable remote config changes.

safety.footer: Supervised collectors apply remote config through OpAMP and report status back here.

validate.title: Validate before push
validate.body: Server-side checks parse YAML, verify collector structure, and compare referenced components with this workload.

helper.success: This draft passed validation and can move to the push step.
helper.error: Resolve the blocking validation errors before pushing.

compare.title: Compare with active config
compare.body: Use the diff to review YAML and OTel impact before changing the live collector.

helper.error: Reload the active config before relying on the diff.
helper.first: No active config exists yet, so this push will become the first known config.
helper.available: Review the active-vs-draft diff before pushing.

push.title: Push safely
push.body: Remote config is sent only after validation passes and the workload can accept pushes.

helper.readonly: This collector runs in read-only mode and cannot receive remote config.
helper.timeout: No response has arrived yet; keep monitoring before retrying.
helper.applying: Waiting for the workload to acknowledge the new config.
helper.failed: The workload rejected or failed to apply the last pushed config.
helper.applied: The workload reported that the latest pushed config was applied.

rollback.title: Roll back to known-good
rollback.body: Push history keeps previous revisions available when you need to recover quickly.

helper.auto: Automatically restored {{hash}} after the workload reported a failed apply.
helper.history: Use push history to inspect or restore a previous revision.
helper.empty: After the first successful push, this workload will keep rollback history.

canary.title: Manual canary push
canary.subtitle: Validate a small target set before promoting a remote config to the rest of the workload.
canary.safety_plan_required: Generate a non-blocking Config Safety Plan before starting a canary.

application_plan.title: Config Safety Plan
application_plan.ready_help: Review target eligibility, validation, missing components, and risk before pushing.
application_plan.blocked_help: Push is blocked until hard failures are removed or invalid targets are excluded.
application_plan.rollout_not_persisted: Save as rollout is not available yet; export JSON/Markdown instead.
application_plan.export_fallback: JSON export will be generated in your browser because the backend export endpoint is unavailable.

action.rollout_title: Persisted rollout storage is not implemented by the backend yet.

apply.empty: — No saved configs (create one in Configs) —

permission.push_blocked: You don't have permission to push workload configurations. This config is read-only for your account.
permission.validate_blocked: You don't have permission to validate workload configurations.

scope.title: Push target scope
scope.help: Preview saved or dynamic groups before pushing. The current workload path remains the only executable push action.
scope.bulk_push_unavailable: Bulk push requires a backend push endpoint; use preview to verify scope safety.
scope.blocked_warning: Blocked targets must be excluded before a safe push.
scope.ready: Ready to push: every previewed target is remote-config capable.

disabled.wait_current_validate: Wait for the current push to finish before validating again.
disabled.fix_validation_preview: Fix validation errors before previewing targets.
disabled.wait_current_preview: Wait for the current push to finish before previewing targets.
disabled.select_saved_group: Select a saved group before previewing targets.
disabled.enter_selector: Enter at least one selector field before previewing targets.
disabled.fix_validation_plan: Fix validation errors before generating a plan.
disabled.wait_current_plan: Wait for the current push to finish before generating a plan.
disabled.generate_valid_plan: Generate a valid configuration before planning a push.
disabled.generate_plan: Generate the safety plan before pushing.
disabled.plan_blocks_push: Config safety plan blocks this push.
disabled.wait_current_push: Wait for the current push to finish.

reason.read_only: Workload does not accept remote config.
reason.incompatible: Workload is incompatible with this config.
reason.workload_does_not_accept_remote_config: Workload does not accept remote config.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.empty: No workloads match the current filter

security.title: Security
security.err_weak: Password must be at least 12 characters and different from current.
security.err_mismatch: The two new passwords do not match.

sso.description: Manage SAML SSO providers and group mappings.

field.id.help: Lowercase letters, digits and dashes. 1–64 characters. Cannot be changed after creation.

delete.confirm: Delete provider {{id}}? This also removes its mappings.

mappings.title: Group mappings
mappings.empty: No mapping. SSO logins will fail unless default groups are set.

error.permission: You don't have permission to manage SSO providers.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

configs.title: Config Library
configs.subtitle: Saved configs, templates, drafts, and known-good references in one safe workspace.
configs.empty: No configs or templates available yet.

saved.title: Saved configs
saved.body: Operator-created configs ready to reuse or push.

template.title: Templates
template.body: Safe stack starters with placeholders instead of secret values.

draft.title: Drafts
draft.body: In-progress configs seeded from blank YAML or a template.

known_good.title: Known-good references
known_good.body: Stable revisions that can guide rollback and recovery.

form.name: Name
form.secret_help: Use placeholders such as ${OTLP_AUTH_HEADER}; do not paste plaintext secrets.

templates.title: Templates
templates.subtitle: Built-in starter configs grouped by stack. Variables show the expected placeholders only.
templates.no_variables: No variables advertised for this template.

saved.title: Saved configs and references
saved.subtitle: Older rows without library metadata are treated as saved configs.

config_drift.title: Fleet drift dashboard
config_drift.subtitle: Track expected vs effective collector config, stalled pushes, unsupported collectors, outdated versions, component gaps and heterogeneous groups.
config_drift.table_hint: Disabled controls explain what is missing instead of exposing unsafe actions.
config_drift.error: Unable to load config drift dashboard.

action_reasons.diff_requires_config_content: Diff view needs retrievable config content for both expected and effective hashes.
action_reasons.validate_from_workload_detail: Dashboard rows expose config hashes only; validate current from the workload detail config editor.
action_reasons.review_expected_before_push: Expected config content must be reviewed from workload detail before pushing.
action_reasons.rollback_from_workload_detail: Rollback must be prepared from workload detail so config history and confirmation checks are visible.
action_reasons.ignore_not_implemented: Ignore persistence is not implemented yet.
action_reasons.remote_config_unsupported: Remote config is not supported by this collector.
action_reasons.push_pending_too_long: A config push is already pending too long; review status before retrying.
